creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
The module MooseX::HasDefaults::RO defaults is to ro.

The module MooseX::HasDefaults::RW defaults is to rw.

If you pass a specific value to any has's is, that overrides the default. If 
you do not want an accessor, pass is => undef.

For Committer's Reference : 
http://tb.s.ubze.ro//logs/7.4-FreeBSD/i386/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults-0.03.log
http://tb.s.ubze.ro//logs/7.4-FreeBSD/amd64/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults-0.03.log

http://tb.s.ubze.ro//logs/8.2-RELEASE/amd64/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults-0.03.log

http://tb.s.ubze.ro//logs/9.0-FreeBSD/amd64/p5-MooseX-HasDefaults-0.03.log
